title: Judge signs off on Anthropic’s $1.5bn book piracy settlement, the biggest in US copyright history
summary: A federal judge in San Francisco has signed off on Anthropic’s $1.5 billion settlement with authors who accused the company of training its Claude models on pirated books, closing what lawyers on both sides describe as the largest copyright recovery in United…
